
    // ---- Tinter Furniture ----
class tint {
  class furniture {
    file = "furniture\functions";
    class dressDown {};
    class dressUp {};
    class translate {};
    class updateHouse {};
    class init {};
    class preinit {preInit=1;};
  };
};


    class OSF
    {
        // ---- Core ----
        class core
        {
            class boot            { description = "Initialise global game state namespace"; };
            class debugOverlay    { description = "Togglable debug HUD overlay (Ctrl+F12)"; };
            class startupMenu     { description = "Mission start screen — Continue or New Game"; };
            class playerRespawn   { description = "Custom player death → respawn at TOC"; };
            class tutorialIntro   { description = "New game tutorial sequence leading to TOC"; };
            class weatherCycle    { description = "Dynamic weather transition loop"; };
            class blackListBuildings { description = "Exclude buildings from furniture script"}
        };

        // ---- Sectors ----
        class sectors
        {
            class setSector          { description = "Set a named field and trigger side effects"; };
            class updateMarker       { description = "Sync map marker color to sector status"; };
        };

        // ---- Save ----
        class save
        {
            class saveState          { description = "Serialise game state to profileNamespace"; };
            class loadState          { description = "Restore game state from profileNamespace"; };
        };

        // ---- ODA ---- (Phase A2 — uncomment when building)
        class oda
        {
        //     file = "scripts\oda";
            class odaInit            { description = "Initialise ODA roster and unit definitions"; };
            class odaSpawn           { description = "Spawn a single ODA slot; assigns identity and joins player group"; };
            class odaDismiss         { description = "Remove a deployed ODA unit and return slot to standby"; };
            class odaApplyLoadout      { description = "Apply loadout to a unit"; };
            class odaHandleUnitDeath   { description = "Handle unit killed EH — marks slot KIA and clears runtime refs"; };
            class odaReplacementWatcher { description = "Scheduled: waits out the replacement timer then returns slot to standby"; };
            class odaIncap             { description = "Trigger incapacitation: animate, freeze damage, start timer, add revive action"; };
            class odaIncapWatcher      { description = "Scheduled: medic proximity check and incap timer expiry loop"; };
            class odaRevive            { description = "Execute revive sequence: sleep duration, restore unit, clear incap state"; };
        //     class odaPassives        { description = "Calculate and apply active passive bonuses"; };
        //     class odaMedicRevive     { description = "Medic auto-revive logic"; };
        //     class odaDeath           { description = "Handle permanent death and replacement timer"; };
        };

        // ---- Militia ---- (Phase A4)
        class militia
        {
            class upgradeInit         { description = "Initialise upgrade tree state (16 nodes, CP counter)"; };
            class upgradeHasNode      { description = "Query a single upgrade node boolean; primary API for other systems"; };
            class upgradeCanPurchase  { description = "Validate prereqs and CP cost before purchase"; };
            class upgradePurchase     { description = "Execute node purchase: deduct CP and flip boolean"; };
            class upgradeAddPoints    { description = "Add command points to the pool (sector liberation, side objectives)"; };
        };

        // ---- Counterattack ---- (Phase A5 — uncomment when building)
        // class counterattack
        // {
        //     file = "scripts\counterattack";
        //     class caEvaluate         { description = "Evaluate whether a counterattack should trigger"; };
        //     class caLaunch           { description = "Launch counterattack waves on a sector"; };
        //     class caWave             { description = "Spawn a single counterattack wave"; };
        // };

        // ---- Operations ---- (Phase B4 — uncomment when building)
        class operations
        {
            // class opSetup            { description = "Pre-operation setup and briefing"; };
            // class opSuccess          { description = "Handle operation success"; };
            // class opFailure          { description = "Handle operation failure"; };
            // class opAlliedPool       { description = "Track allied AI force pool"; };
        };

        // ---- Side Objectives ---- (Phase A8 — uncomment when building)
        // class sideobj
        // {
        //     file = "scripts\sideobj";
        //     class soScout            { description = "Resolve question mark marker on player approach"; };
        //     class soAADestroy        { description = "AA emplacement side objective"; };
        //     class soIntelGather      { description = "Intel documents side objective"; };
        // };

        // ---- TOC ---- (Phase A2 — uncomment when building)
        class toc
        {
        //     file = "scripts\toc";
               class strategicMapOpen   { description = "Open strategic map from TOC base object"; };
               class tocInit                 { description = "Initialise TOC interactions"; };
               class tocApplySupplyLoadout   { description = "Apply supply box loadout to OSF_toc_supply_001"; };
               class tocSupplyWatcher        { description = "Scheduled loop: restock supply box every 48 in-game hours"; };
               class tocSquadUI              { description = "Squad management interface"; };
               class tocMilitiaUI            { description = "FIA Upgrade Command dialog"; };
        //     class tocRequisitionUI   { description = "Asset requisition interface"; };
        };

        // ---- Utils ----
        class utils
        {
            class setMissionVar      { description = "Set a missionNamespace variable with optional RPT logging"; };
            class getMissionVar      { description = "Get a missionNamespace variable with default fallback and missing-key warning"; };
            class setProfileVar      { description = "Set a profileNamespace variable with optional RPT logging"; };
            class getProfileVar      { description = "Get a profileNamespace variable with default fallback and missing-key warning"; };
            class hasVar             { description = "Check whether a key exists on any namespace"; };
            class log                { description = "Write to RPT; also echoes to systemChat when OSF_debug is true"; };
            class getState          { description = "Returns a missionNameSpace item state hashmap."; };
            class getStateField  { description = "Returns a named field from an item's runtime state hashmap."; };
            class getStateKeys   { description = "Returns all IDs from a state registry hashmap."; };
            class getStateValues { description = "Returns all item hashmaps from a state registry."; };
            class titleText          { description = "Returns styled structured-text string for titleText"; };
            class taskCreate         { description = "Create a BIS task from the task registry"; };
            class taskSetState       { description = "Set BIS task state and update runtime tracking"; };
            class taskRecreateAll    { description = "Recreate all tasks from saved state on mission load"; };
            class notify             { description = "Custom notification bar — replaces hint/hintSilent"; };
            class damageBuildings    { description = "Randomly damage buildings within a trigger or position+radius"; };
            class spawnOpenField     { description = "Find 27 open field positions and spawn objects at each"; };
        };

        // ---- action menu ----
        class menu
        {
            class findCover { description = "Sends squad into cover, expecting contact"; };
            class suppressArea { description = "Makes all squad members suppress the players cursor target, works fon friendly target too";};
            class fireOnLead { description = "Units hold fire until player fire's a round";};
            class retreat     { description = "All units drop smoke and sprint 150m away from nearest enemy"; };
            class advance          { description = "All units sprint 50m ahead of the player's current facing"; };
            class regroup {};
            class skipTime {};
            class vehicleDrop {};
        }
    };
